reviews.comment:
Buena onda de los playeros. Andá con tiempo porque siempre hay fila para cargar combustible

(Translated by Google)
Good vibes from the beach. Get there early because there's always a line to fill up with gas.

reviews.comment:
Precios módicos en la Full, buena atención!

(Translated by Google)
Reasonable prices at Full, great service!

reviews.comment:

(Translated by Google)
Full bar. Good prices. Wi-Fi. TV.

reviews.comment:
Los baños están limpios y tiene acceso a wifi libre

(Translated by Google)
The bathrooms are clean and there is free Wi-Fi access.

reviews.comment:
Muy limpio todo y eso no lo encontrás en casi ninguna estación de servicio sobretodo los baños

(Translated by Google)
Everything was very clean, and you hardly ever find that at any other gas station, especially the bathrooms.

reviews.comment:
Excelente atención del personal. Para cargar nafta hay colas tremendas

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service from the staff. However, there are enormous lines to get gas.

Good as always.

reviews.comment:
Es muy bueno y rápido, para no hacer cola hay que ir en horario donde van todos a la playa. Tiene para inflar las ruedas gratis.

(Translated by Google)
It's very good and fast. To avoid the lines, you have to go at the time when everyone else is at the beach. They offer free tire inflation.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/12748059352839021938/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURtbFBhdkxREAE

reviews.comment:
Estación de servicio un poco antigua. No tiene en todas las islas todos los tipos de combustible. Siempre hay fila para cargar nafta y es un poco lento la atención la cual es buena.

(Translated by Google)
The gas station is a bit old. Not all pumps carry every type of fuel. There's always a line to fill up, and the service, while good, is a bit slow.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/12748059352839021938/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURtLVBybjR3RRAB
